meta.description: Single source of truth for all Noble Architecture standard SketchUp component and group naming conventions. Documents the prefix systems, ID formats, sub-part names, and attribute dictionary keys used across all Na__ plugins. Serves as the reference for any plugin that creates or identifies Na__ components in the model.
meta.idFormatNote: The standard Na__ ID pattern is a 3-letter type code + 3-digit zero-padded number, e.g. AWN001, ADR002, PNL003. The ID is followed by __ and a descriptor. This gives 999 unique IDs per type which is sufficient for any single model.
meta.divergenceNote: The ValeDesignSuite WindowPanelConfigurator uses a PNL prefix and different dictionary name (WindowConfigurator_Config without Na__ prefix) which diverges from the Na__ standard. This is flagged for alignment.

WindowAssemblies__AWN__.Description: Window assembly components created by Na__ArchTools__3dWindowConfigTool. Each window is a self-contained SketchUp component with a unique AWN ID.

Keys.windowMetadata: JSON array - window metadata (UniqueId, Name, Description, dates)
Keys.windowConfiguration: JSON object - dimension and material configuration

LegacyDictionary.Note: Legacy fallback key used in older versions. Defined as NA_WINDOW_DICT_NAME in Na__WindowConfiguratorTool__Main__.rb.

DoorAssemblies__ADR__.Description: Door assembly components detected and exported by TrueVision3D GlbBuilder. The ADR > MOD/ROT hierarchy is preserved as a glTF node subtree for animated door operation in the Web 3D Viewer.
DoorAssemblies__ADR__.HierarchyNote: Door assemblies contain child objects with MOD (modifier) and ROT (rotation point) prefixes. The GlbBuilder detects ADR-prefixed entities and preserves the parent-child hierarchy in the GLB node tree.

MOD.Description: Modifier object - a door leaf or panel that rotates about the ROT point

ROT.Description: Rotation point marker - defines the hinge axis for door leaf animation

PanelComponents__PNL__.Description: Window panel components created by ValeDesignSuite WindowPanelConfigurator (standalone, not the ArchTools version). Used for bespoke one-off window configurations.

OnComponentDefinition.Note: Does not use Na__ prefix - diverges from standard. Candidate for alignment.

DivergenceFlags: Dictionary name 'WindowConfigurator_Config' lacks the Na__ namespace prefix
ComponentMaterial values use 'natural-wood' and 'glass' strings rather than MAT-indexed IDs

Primitives__.Description: Primitive geometry objects inserted by Na__InsertPrimatives plugin.

PrimitiveCube.Description: Axis-aligned box primitive placed interactively in the model

GlbExportNodes__.Description: Internal node name suffixes appended by TrueVision3D GlbBuilder to differentiate the two GLB export segments produced per model.

Suffixes.__MeshModel__: Appended to the export filename for the face/mesh geometry GLB
Suffixes.__LineworkModel__: Appended to the export filename for the edge/linework geometry GLB

GlbExportNodes__.SharedLineworkNote: Internal glTF node name for instanced linework geometry. Not a SketchUp entity name.

AttributeDictionaryCatalogue.Description: Complete list of all attribute dictionary names used by Noble Architecture plugins across the model. Use this as a reference to avoid naming collisions when adding new dictionary keys.

Na__WindowConfiguratorInfo.Purpose: Stores the AWN WindowID and SketchUp entity names on the placed instance

Na__WindowConfigurator_{WindowID}.Purpose: Stores full window config JSON (metadata, components, windowConfiguration) keyed by WindowID

Na__WindowConfigurator_Config.Purpose: Legacy fallback dictionary name used in older versions of the Window Configurator

WindowConfigurator_Config.Purpose: Stores window panel config in the standalone ValeDesignSuite panel configurator. Note: lacks Na__ prefix.

BenchConfigurator_Config.Purpose: Stores bench configuration data on a bench component definition
